name: Gilwern & the Clydach Gorge
terrain: Canal, woodland, old tramway, steep gorge paths
highlights: Dramatic industrial archaeology in a hidden wooded gorge.
points_of_interest: Clydach Ironworks (Cadw); Devil's Bridge; Hill's Tramroad; Navigation Colliery
food_drink_nearby: The Navigation Inn Gilwern (canal-side, award-winning); Lion Inn Govilon
hazards_notes: Steep unguarded drops in gorge; slippery rocks
